testcase.name: loginErrorValidation

failure.message: expected [Incorrect email password.] but found [Incorrect email or password.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Incorrect email password.] but found [Incorrect email or password.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: productErrorValidation
